metadata.description: Drive local LLMs (LM Studio, Ollama, any OpenAI-compatible endpoint) from Claude Code as a sandboxed sub-agent with its own memory and tool use.

plugins.name: agnt
plugins.description: Sandboxed local-model agent exposed to Claude Code via MCP. Lets Claude converse with a locally-hosted LLM that can read/edit files in a scoped workspace.
